projects.title: 🚗 LPR Automated Parking

projects.title: 🏠 Smart Home IoT Suite
projects.description: Full home automation with Raspberry Pi, NodeMCU, and sensors. Remote control, real-time monitoring, and alerts.

projects.description: Complete ERP-style system: POS, Biometric Attendance, Payroll, Inventory, and WhatsApp integration.

projects.title: ⛓️ Smart Contracts & Web3
projects.description: Decentralized applications using Solidity, Web3.js, and Ethereum. Built secure and transparent smart contracts for real-world use.

projects.title: 🧠 Chatbot Training & NLP
projects.description: Trained custom AI chatbots using Rasa, Dialogflow, and custom NLP pipelines for business automation and customer support.

projects.title: 🇵🇰 Urdu Language Chatbot
projects.description: Developed a chatbot that understands and responds in Urdu. Built for local businesses and customer support in Pakistan.
